content: PlayDesk business hours: Monday through Thursday, 10:00 AM to 11:00 PM (last entry 10:00 PM). Friday through Sunday and public holidays, 10:00 AM to 1:00 AM the following day (last entry midnight). The lounge is closed on Chinese New Year's Eve and the first day of Chinese New Year.

Last entry and closing policy: On weekdays (Monday–Thursday), the last entry is at 10:00 PM and the lounge closes at 11:00 PM. On weekends and public holidays, the last entry is at midnight (00:00) and the lounge closes at 1:00 AM. Customers present at closing time will be asked to finish their current session; no new sessions start after the last-entry time.

Holiday hours: PlayDesk is open on all public holidays with extended weekend hours (10:00 AM to 1:00 AM). The only full closures are Chinese New Year's Eve and Chinese New Year Day 1. During Golden Week and other multi-day holidays, normal weekend hours apply throughout.
